mapper.select: SELECT permission_id AS permissionId, permission_category_id AS permissionCategoryId, permission_code AS permissionCode, permission_name AS permissionName FROM permission ORDER BY permission_category_id, permission_id
mapper.insert:
SELECT 'ROLE_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '_' || LPAD( NVL( MAX( TO_NUMBER( SUBSTR( role_id, LENGTH('ROLE_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '_') + 1 ) ) ), 0 ) + 1, 4, '0' ) FROM role WHERE role_id LIKE 'ROLE_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '_%'
INSERT INTO role ( role_id, role_name, created_by, created_at ) VALUES ( #{roleId}, #{roleName}, #{createdBy}, SYSDATE )

SELECT 'ROLE_PERMISSION_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '_' || LPAD( NVL( MAX( TO_NUMBER( SUBSTR( role_permission_id, LENGTH('ROLE_PERMISSION_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '_') + 1 ) ) ), 0 ) + 1, 4, '0' ) FROM role_permission WHERE role_permission_id LIKE 'ROLE_PERMISSION_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '_%'
INSERT INTO role_permission ( role_permission_id, role_id, permission_id, created_at ) VALUES ( #{rolePermissionId}, #{roleId}, #{permissionId}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT NVL( MAX( TO_NUMBER( SUBSTR( role_permission_id, LENGTH('ROLE_PERMISSION_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '_') + 1 ) ) ), 0 ) + 1 FROM role_permission WHERE role_permission_id LIKE 'ROLE_PERMISSION_' || TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMM') || '_%'
mapper.insert:
INSERT ALL
INTO role_permission ( role_permission_id, role_id, permission_id, created_at ) VALUES ( #{item.rolePermissionId}, #{item.roleId}, #{item.permissionId}, SYSDATE )
SELECT 1 FROM dual
mapper.select: SELECT r.role_id AS roleId, r.role_name AS roleName, r.created_by AS createdBy, r.created_at AS createdAt, COUNT(pm.project_member_id) AS memberCount FROM role r LEFT JOIN project_member pm ON r.role_id = pm.role_id WHERE r.created_by = #{createdBy} GROUP BY r.role_id, r.role_name, r.created_by, r.created_at ORDER BY r.created_at DESC, r.role_id DESC

SELECT p.project_id AS "projectId", p.project_name AS "projectName",
t.team_id AS "teamId", t.team_name AS "teamName",
u.user_id AS "userId", u.login_id AS "loginId", u.user_name AS "userName", u.email AS "email",
r.role_id AS "roleId", r.role_name AS "roleName" FROM project_member pm JOIN role r ON pm.role_id = r.role_id JOIN project p ON pm.project_id = p.project_id JOIN team_member tm ON pm.team_member_id = tm.team_member_id JOIN users u ON tm.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN team t ON tm.team_id = t.team_id WHERE pm.role_id = #{roleId} ORDER BY p.project_name, t.team_name, u.user_name
SELECT role_id AS "roleId", role_name AS "roleName", created_by AS "createdBy", created_at AS "createdAt" FROM role WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
SELECT permission_id FROM role_permission WHERE role_id = #{roleId} ORDER BY permission_id
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM project_member WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
